mnemonics: HAT-T: Humans And Teammates - Trust. Human-AI teams must be built on Trust, facilitated by effective Tele-bots.
keyPoints: Human-AI Teaming shifts AI from a tool to a collaborative partner.
Effective teamwork requires shared situational awareness between humans and AI.
Tele-bots act as a crucial interface, translating human intent into machine action and vice versa.
commonMistakes: Designing for full autonomy instead of calibrated trust and human oversight.
Underestimating the importance of transparent communication from the AI (explainability).
Focusing only on the AI's technical performance, not on the human's experience within the team.
